svg.title: Review Vessel Visit Notification - Process View

g.text: Review Vessel Visit Notification - Process View
click "View" on a Vessel Visit Notification
The officer selects a notification from the list\nfor detailed review before decision.

Converts domain entity to VesselVisitNotificationDto:
• BusinessId
• Vessel info
• Cargo manifests
• Crew
• Status
• Dates
• Approval/Rejection details

Populates all fields:
• Vessel and dock
• Manifests (Loading/Unloading)
• Crew & officers
• Approval/Rejection metadata
• Status badge
• Edit button if InProgress
